ValidationRule.description: Requires PO/WO/Signed Quotation, Advance Received, and Advance Payment Mode when stage is Closed Won.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( ISPICKVAL(StageName, 'Closed Won'), OR( ISPICKVAL(PO_WO_Signed_Quotation__c, ''), ISPICKVAL(Advance_Received__c, ''), ISPICKVAL(Advance_Payment_Mode__c, ''), ISPICKVAL(Advance_Realized__c, '') ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: PO/WO/Signed Quotation, Advance Received, Advance Payment Mode, and Advance Realized are all required when marking an Opportunity as Closed Won.
